title: Actions
description: Outstanding extension-defined Action instances, keyed by reverse-domain Action type, not extension name.

instance.description: Common fields for one outstanding Action instance are id, required, and optional config. The extension declaring the Action type defines type-specific processing data under config. Additional properties are permitted for forward compatibility.

required.description: Whether this Action instance gates the parent-specific effect specified for its Action type.

config.description: Configuration defined by the extension that declares this Action type.

additionalProperties.description: Non-empty instances of one Action type. JSON preserves array order; the declaring extension defines whether order has processing semantics.
